title: CMG's 8K Paris Olympics broadcasts bring immersive experience globally - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: China Media Group's (CMG) broadcasting of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games, powered by advanced technologies including artificial intelligence (AI) and 8K ultra-high definition, is bringing an immersive audiovisual experience to viewers around the world.
